profile_text:
Hassan Mansour, Product Manager at M42's customer-facing apps team, 4 years here.

Honestly the reason I'm filling this out is mixed. I'm in the middle of a difficult performance review process with my line manager Karim — there's a formal review on the table and HR is involved. I think it's been handled unfairly but I don't want to get into that here.

What I'm actually interested in: I want to find peers and mentors outside my direct reporting chain. Specifically NOT Karim, NOT anyone on my current team, and NOT anyone in the chain above Karim (which goes up to Maya, the head of consumer products).

My actual work: I lead the loyalty programme product, with focus on retention mechanics, A/B testing, and customer segmentation. Interests are in growth product management, behavioural science, and pricing strategy. Looking for: (a) PMs in other M42 OpCos working on similar growth/retention problems; (b) senior product mentors outside the consumer apps org; (c) maybe a community or channel where I can keep learning even if my current role situation is unclear.

I'm hoping this can be helpful without anything I say here ending up in the formal review thread.
